positive: A stylized and vibrant cosmic cat exploring a crystalline jungle at twilight. The cat has a sleek, elegant silhouette, surrounded by bioluminescent flora and towering mineral structures. The composition is central and symmetrical, featuring deep indigo blues, emerald greens, and pops of ethereal gold and magenta. The art style should be highly detailed digital concept art, emphasizing clean lines and strong contrast, perfect for a repeating apparel pattern element. Studio quality, volumetric lighting, vaporwave aesthetic, minimalist depth.
negative: blurry, distorted, low resolution, noise, grainy, artifacts, signature, logo, watermark, text, poor anatomy, extra limbs, multiple subjects, cartoonish, sketch, oil painting
